hero.title: Transparent pricing
hero.subtitle: No hidden fees. Pay only for what you need.

free.name: Free
free.description: To get started. Everything you need, no time limit.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For a growing business with high customer flow.

business.name: Business
business.description: For chains and large companies with multiple locations.

q1.q: How do I switch to a paid plan?
q1.a: Submit a request using the button on the plan you want — we'll get in touch within one business day and help you get set up.

q2.q: Is there a discount for annual payment?
q2.a: Yes — a 20% discount applies for annual payment. Ask about it when submitting your request.

q3.q: What happens to my data when I change plans?
q3.a: All your data — bookings, customers, history — is preserved no matter what plan changes you make.

q4.q: Can I try it for free?
q4.a: The Free plan is available with no time limit. Registration takes 2 minutes, no card required.

bottomCta.title: Still have questions?
bottomCta.subtitle: Write to us — we'll reply within an hour during business hours.

product.name: Product team
product.desc: We build a convenient tool for businesses based on the real needs of our customers.

support.name: Support
support.desc: We help set up the system and resolve questions within an hour during business hours.

security.name: Security
security.desc: Customer data is protected by encryption. Payment data is never stored on our servers.

hero.title: About the Booking platform
hero.subtitle: We're building a tool that helps small and medium businesses in Kyrgyzstan move customer bookings online — no calls, no messengers, no paper logbooks.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.p1: Most small businesses in the country still take bookings over WhatsApp or by phone. It's inconvenient for customers and takes up the owners' time.
mission.p2: We built a simple system that can be set up in a single day and start accepting bookings online right away — no developers or technical knowledge required.

cta.title: Want to talk to us?
cta.subtitle: We'll tell you more about what the platform can do for your business.

section1.title: 1. General provisions
section1.body: These Terms of Service govern the relationship between the Booking platform (hereinafter — the "Service", "We") and users of the service (hereinafter — the "User", "You"). By using the Service, you agree to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of the Service
section2.body: Booking is an online booking platform that allows business owners to accept bookings over the internet, and allows customers to book services in real time.

items.item1: Using the Service requires registration with a valid email address.
items.item2: You are responsible for keeping your account information secure.
items.item3: Sharing account access with third parties is prohibited.
items.item4: We may suspend an account that violates these Terms.

items.item1: A booking is considered confirmed once you receive an email notification.
items.item2: Cancellation terms are set independently by each business.
items.item3: Payment transactions are processed through Bakai PayLink under the payment provider's terms.
items.item4: The Service is not responsible for the quality of services provided through the platform.

items.item1: You guarantee the accuracy of the information about your business.
items.item2: Posting illegal or misleading content is prohibited.
items.item3: You agree to honor confirmed bookings.

section6.title: 6. Limitation of liability
section6.body: The Service is provided "as is". We are not liable for any losses arising from the use or inability to use the Service, except as required by the legislation of the Kyrgyz Republic.

section7.title: 7. Changes to the Terms
section7.body: We may amend these Terms. Continued use of the Service after such changes are published constitutes your agreement to the new Terms.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.bodyPrefix: For questions related to these Terms:

item2.label: Booking data:
item2.text: selected services, time, number of guests, notes.

item3.label: Payment data:
item3.text: transaction status and amount (card data is never stored on our servers).

item4.label: Technical data:
item4.text: IP address, browser type, visit time.

items.item1: To operate the Service and process bookings.
items.item2: To send booking confirmations and notifications.
items.item3: To improve the quality of the Service and technical support.
items.item4: To prevent fraud and ensure security.

section3.title: 3. Sharing data with third parties
section3.intro: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except for:

items.item1: Bakai PayLink, our payment provider, for processing payments.
items.item2: Resend, our email service, for sending notifications.
items.item3: Cases required by the legislation of the Kyrgyz Republic.

section4.title: 4. Data storage and protection
section4.body: Data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are stored encrypted (bcrypt). We take technical and organizational measures to protect your data from unauthorized access.

item1.label: Access:
item1.text: you may request a copy of your data.

item2.label: Correction:
item2.text: you may update your data in your profile settings.

item3.label: Deletion:
item3.text: you may request deletion of your account and data through support.

section6.title: 6. Cookies
section6.body: We use essential cookies to operate the Service (session, authentication). Analytics cookies are not used without your consent.

section7.title: 7. Contact
section7.bodyPrefix: For questions about the processing of personal data:

reviewer1.name: Aigul M.
reviewer1.text: Great service! Stylist Aida is a true professional.

reviewer2.name: Manas B.
reviewer2.text: Easy to book, got in without waiting in line.

hero.subtitle: A step-by-step overview of every feature — for business owners and customers.

businessSection.title: For business owners
businessSection.subtitle: Manage your business, bookings, and schedule in one place

customerSection.title: For customers
customerSection.subtitle: Find a venue and book in 30 seconds

setup.title: Create your business profile in 5 minutes
setup.desc: Add your name, business type, address, and get a unique booking page link. Add a logo and up to 10 photos for your gallery — this builds customer trust.

checks.check2: Auto-generated slug from your business name, manually editable
checks.check3: Types: Salon, Restaurant, Hotel, Coworking, Sport, Medical
checks.check4: Upload a logo and up to 10 gallery photos (drag & drop)

bookings.title: All bookings in one dashboard
bookings.desc: A list of current bookings with filters by status and date. Confirm, complete, or cancel bookings in a single click. Reschedule bookings right from the card.

checks.check3: Reschedule bookings: pick a new date and time with conflict checking
checks.check4: Customer name, phone, and email on every card

calendar.title: A visual calendar of your bookings
calendar.desc: Switch to Calendar view to see all of the month's bookings color-coded by status. Click on a day to get a list of bookings for that date.

checks.check2: Clicking a date switches to the list filtered to that day
checks.check3: Navigate forward and backward through months
checks.check4: Time blocks are shown separately with a 🔒 icon

manual.title: Add a booking manually or block off time
manual.desc: Did a customer call or walk in? Add their booking manually right from the dashboard. Need to close an hour for technical reasons? Add a block — the slot disappears from online booking.

checks.check1: "Customer booking" mode: name, phone, service, date, and time
checks.check2: "Block" mode: the time becomes unavailable to customers
checks.check3: Manual bookings are flagged with a "manual" badge on the dashboard
checks.check4: Blocks can be removed with one click, bookings can be rescheduled
checks.check5: Conflict checking: you can't create an overlapping booking

schedule.title: Days off and vacations for every staff member
schedule.desc: Set specific exception dates for any resource or staff member: a full day off (customers can't book) or a shortened day with different working hours.

checks.check1: Day off: the slot disappears entirely from online booking
checks.check2: Special hours: temporarily replace the standard schedule
checks.check4: Upcoming and past exceptions are split into separate tabs
checks.check5: Existing bookings are not automatically canceled

stats.title: Real-time stats and revenue
stats.desc: The dashboard shows key business metrics: revenue, number of bookings, load by day of week, and popular services. Compare the current month to the previous one.

checks.check1: Revenue this month and comparison with the previous period
checks.check3: Load chart by day of week
checks.check4: Top 5 popular services with share of revenue
checks.check5: Filter by business (if you have more than one venue)

policy.title: Booking cancellation policy
policy.desc: Set the cancellation rules: a free period, the fee amount, and a "no refund" window. Customers see this policy before confirming a cancellation.

checks.check1: Free cancellation: specify how many hours before the start
checks.check3: "No refund" window — how many hours before, the payment is non-refundable
checks.check4: Customers see the policy in a modal before canceling
checks.check5: The policy applies to all bookings for this business

explore.title: Find a venue with convenient filters
explore.desc: A catalog of all venues with search by name, filters by type, rating, photo availability, and online booking. Sort by newest, rating, and alphabetically.

checks.check1: Real-time search by name and description
checks.check2: Filter by category: Salon, Restaurant, Hotel, Sport…
checks.check5: Sorting: newest, by rating, A–Z, Z–A
checks.check6: Active filters are shown as tags with an × button

bookingFlow.title: A step-by-step booking process
bookingFlow.desc: An adaptive booking wizard guides the customer through choosing a service, staff member, date, and time. Clear hints at every step, with the ability to go back.

checks.check1: Steps: Service → Staff/resource → Date → Time → Confirmation
checks.check2: For hotels: select a check-in/check-out date range
checks.check4: Email confirmation sent to the customer after booking
checks.check5: Online payment via Bakai PayLink (if enabled by the business)

slots.title: Time selection with live slots
slots.desc: Only truly available slots — the system automatically removes booked intervals, days off, and blocked time. Shows the duration of every slot.

checks.check1: Slots are generated from the staff member's schedule in real time
checks.check2: Booked, past, and blocked slots are hidden
checks.check3: Days off and special hours are accounted for automatically
checks.check4: Service duration is shown under each slot
checks.check5: If there are no slots, a clear message suggests picking another date

reviews.title: Leave a review after your visit
reviews.desc: After a completed booking, the customer can leave a rating and a comment. Reviews are visible to everyone on the venue page. The owner can reply to every review.

checks.check1: 1–5 star rating and a text comment
checks.check2: One review per visit — protection against fake reviews
checks.check3: The average rating is shown on the card in the catalog
checks.check4: The owner can publicly reply to a review
checks.check5: A rating distribution chart on the venue page

bottomCta.title: Ready to get started?
bottomCta.subtitle: Sign up for free and set up online booking in a single day.
bottomCta.note: No hidden fees · 5-minute setup · Cancel anytime

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page doesn't exist or has been removed

error.title: Something went wrong
error.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
